name: Potion of Healing
stat_impact: Consumable: Restore 2d4 + 2 hit points.

name: Potion of Climbing
stat_impact: Consumable: Grants climb speed equal to walk speed and advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
stat_impact: Consumable: Can cast Animal Friendship (DC 13) for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
stat_impact: Consumable: Restore 4d4 + 4 hit points.

name: Potion of Fire Breath
stat_impact: Consumable: Can exhale fire (4d6 damage, DC 13 Dex save) three times within 1 hour.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Hill)
stat_impact: Consumable: Permanent: Strength becomes 21 for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Growth
stat_impact: Consumable: Become 'Enlarged' for 1d4 hours (+1d4 damage with weapons).

name: Potion of Poison
stat_impact: Consumable: Cursed: Take 3d6 poison damage and become Poisoned.

name: Potion of Resistance
stat_impact: Consumable: Permanent: Resistance to one damage type for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Water Breathing
stat_impact: Consumable: Breath underwater for 1 hour.

name: Philter of Love
stat_impact: Consumable: Become charmed by the next creature seen for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Clairvoyance
stat_impact: Consumable: Grants the effect of the Clairvoyance spell.

name: Potion of Diminution
stat_impact: Consumable: Become 'Reduced' for 1d4 hours.

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
stat_impact: Consumable: Grants the effect of the Gaseous Form spell for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Frost/Stone)
stat_impact: Consumable: Permanent: Strength becomes 23 for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Fire)
stat_impact: Consumable: Permanent: Strength becomes 25 for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Heroism
stat_impact: Consumable: Gain 10 temp HP and the 'Bless' spell effect for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Invulnerability
stat_impact: Consumable: Resistance to all damage for 1 minute.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
stat_impact: Consumable: Grants the effect of the Detect Thoughts spell for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Superior Healing
stat_impact: Consumable: Restore 8d4 + 8 hit points.

name: Potion of Flying
stat_impact: Consumable: Grants a flying speed equal to walking speed for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Cloud)
stat_impact: Consumable: Permanent: Strength becomes 27 for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Invisibility
stat_impact: Consumable: Become invisible for 1 hour or until attacking/casting.

name: Potion of Longevity
stat_impact: Consumable: Reduces age by 1d6 + 6 years.

name: Potion of Speed
stat_impact: Consumable: Grants the effect of the Haste spell for 1 minute.

name: Potion of Supreme Healing
stat_impact: Consumable: Restore 10d4 + 20 hit points.

name: Potion of Vitality
stat_impact: Consumable: Removes exhaustion and cures diseases/poisons.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Storm)
stat_impact: Consumable: Permanent: Strength becomes 29 for 1 hour.

name: Oil of Etherealness
stat_impact: Consumable: Grants the effect of the Etherealness spell for 1 hour.

name: Oil of Sharpness
stat_impact: Consumable: Permanent: +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls for 1 hour.

name: Oil of Slipperiness
stat_impact: Consumable: Grants the effect of the Freedom of Movement spell for 8 hours.

name: Potion of Maximum Power
stat_impact: Consumable: Next spell of 4th level or lower deals maximum damage.

name: Potion of Possibility
stat_impact: Consumable: Gain two Luck points (fragment of possibility) for 8 hours.

name: Potion of Aqueous Form
stat_impact: Consumable: Transform into liquid form for 1 hour; underwater breathing and swim speed.

name: Potion of Dragon's Majesty
stat_impact: Consumable: Transform into an adult dragon of your choice for 1 hour.
